events.label: reasoning
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant", "failed"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Floating floor installed without required expansion gap at perimeter, causing buckling (FD).",
    "No expansion clearance violates manufacturer instructions and TCNA guidelines for floating installations."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove base/shoe trim to expose perimeter and verify/establish required expansion gap per manufacturer specs.",
    "Relieve buckled planks, re-seat flooring, and reinstall with correct expansion spacing at all vertical obstructions.",
    "Reinstall trim without pinning flooring down."
  ],
  "rationale": "Floating floors require a continuous expansion gap at all perimeters and vertical obstructions per manufacturer instructions and TCNA; absence of the gap caused buckling, making the installation defective and non-compliant.",
  "references": [
    "mfr instructions (floating floor expansion gap)",
    "TCNA Handbook - Installation of floating floors / expansion joints"
  ]
}
